notes: AMR items.json addresses are JP-ROM scoped.

respawn_reopen_policy.ap_handling: Treat each native small chest as single-fire check state when enabled as AP locations; keep unresolved/ambiguous mappings deferred until chest-index proof exists

katam/asm/chest.s: collect path calls CollectChest with object+0xE2
